tone_guidelines: Be precise, informed, and slightly opinionated. Use technical vocabulary confidently but explain jargon when targeting broader audiences. Balance depth with accessibility. Audience expects cutting-edge knowledge and honest assessments.
audience_archetype: Tech-savvy consumers, developers, and early adopters seeking honest reviews, practical tutorials, and industry analysis

platform_hints.youtube: Screen recordings, product unboxings, benchmark comparisons with data overlays. Clean editing with motion graphics.
platform_hints.tiktok: Quick tips, surprising tech hacks, 'things you didn't know' format. On-screen demos.
platform_hints.instagram: Aesthetic product shots, spec comparison carousels, tech setup tours.
platform_hints.linkedin: Industry analysis, career advice in tech, enterprise technology trends.
platform_hints.podcast: Long-form interviews with founders, deep dives on tech trends, product retrospectives.
platform_hints.blog: Detailed tutorials with code snippets, comparison tables, and benchmarks.
platform_hints.twitter: Hot takes on launches, thread-format breakdowns of new tech, polls on preferences.

engagement_rules: Lead with the verdict or key finding — don't bury the lede
Use data, benchmarks, and specifics over subjective claims
Acknowledge trade-offs — audiences distrust pure hype
Include practical 'should you buy/use this?' recommendations
